nodes.name: Grey-winged Inca finch
nodes.summary: The grey-winged Inca finch (Incaspiza ortizi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife International species factsheet
nodes.shortSummary: The grey-winged Inca finch (Incaspiza ortizi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru.

nodes.name: Incaspiza
nodes.summary: Incaspiza（Incaspiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Great Inca finch、Rufous-backed Inca finch、Grey-winged Inca finch等5种鸟类。
